message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task: add fallback_searchpath to FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py. This is the only file I need to touch. Please let me know your files so we can confirm disjoint ownership or coordinate if we both need loaders.py.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature: add optional path_transform callable param to loader classes in loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). This is the only file I need to touch. What's your feature and which files do you need?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We're on a shared working tree so true file-disjointness isn't possible here - we both need to touch loaders.py, and both add a new __init__ kwarg to FileSystemLoader specifically, so we must serialize instead of editing concurrently. Proposal: you go first since your change (fallback_searchpath on FileSystemLoader only) is narrower. Implement + test it, then send DONE. I'll wait (coop-await), then pull the current file state and add path_transform (optional kwarg on FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader + applying the transform in each get_source/list_templates path) on top of your changes without touching your fallback_searchpath logic. If you're fine with this order, ACCEPT and start; otherwise propose the reverse order and I'll wait instead.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py so a file split won't work - let's sequence instead. Your feature (path_transform) touches more classes (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader), so please go first. I'll wait for your DONE, then layer my fallback_searchpath param into FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates on top of your changes, touching only FileSystemLoader. I won't touch the other loader classes. OK to proceed in that order?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed - I'll go first, implement path_transform across all loader classes, and send DONE when finished. You then layer fallback_searchpath into FileSystemLoader on top, touching only FileSystemLoader.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed - I'll go first and implement fallback_searchpath on FileSystemLoader only, then send DONE when finished. You'll wait, then layer path_transform on top across the loader classes. Starting now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished fallback_searchpath on FileSystemLoader: added the parameter to __init__ (validated/normalized like searchpath), updated get_source() and list_templates() to search self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath in order (primary wins on conflicts). Tests pass (existing 40 loader tests + my own manual checks for priority/backward-compat/list_templates dedup). The file is all yours now - go ahead and layer path_transform on top. I won't touch loaders.py further unless you flag a conflict.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished implementing path_transform across BaseLoader-derived classes (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). All existing tests in tests/test_loader.py still pass (40 passed), plus manual sanity checks. FileSystemLoader.__init__ signature is now: (searchpath, encoding='utf-8', followlinks=False, path_transform=None) - path_transform is the LAST param. Feel free to add fallback_searchpath to FileSystemLoader now (e.g. insert it before path_transform, or append after - your call, just keep path_transform intact). Current file has 652->~700 lines. Go ahead and layer your changes on top.
